text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek bakes a huge batch of madeleines to
give to her friends.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You're welcome.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But... I'm in a bit of a pickle.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I made some for myself as well, but I spent so
much time handing them out that it's already
really late...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I can't be eating sweets at this hour... But still...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it would be okay for me to have
some? Just a few.
choice_data_list: Don't give in to the temptation...
How about giving them to someone else?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay, then just a few!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I actually had a taste, and they were quite
delicious, so I've been looking forward to having
some more!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll work extra hard at training tomorrow to
make up for it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek hums a tune as she makes some tea
and enjoys her madeleines.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: O-okay, then here I go.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've been looking forward to eating
them since I was baking. Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'll make some tea while I'm at it. Would you
like some too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek hums to herself as she makes some
tea and happily digs into her madeleines.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ack... You're right...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll save them for tomorrow morning or something.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Fight the urge, fight the urge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek squeezes her eyes shut and stops
herself from eating the madeleines.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Come to think of it... Oguri looked like she
wanted more when I gave her some earlier.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'll have her eat my share.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Mmm... I can't wait to see her stuff her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Super Creek enjoys watching Oguri Cap
munch on the madeleines.
